paper.title_en: Boundary lines and Askey-Wilson type moments
paper.abstract_en: The Wilson line defect half-indices for 3d $\mathcal{N}=2$ gauge theories with boundary confining phases admit a formulation in terms of the Askey-Wilson type moments. In the dual Landau-Ginzburg description the dual line operators can be realized as vortex line defects which induce singular behavior of chiral multiplets associated with the minimal monopole operators, together with additional one-dimensional degrees of freedom. By incorporating such a singular structure as an effective spin shift into the index computation, we obtain exact closed-form expressions for the line defect half-indices which are Askey-Wilson type moments.

reasons: 未达到主题关键词门槛
